name: hb_2_21
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-20 for Zhengding County and Xingtang County compute and store: mean_pm25_zhengding, mean_no2_zhengding, mean_pm25_xingtang, mean_no2_xingtang (float).

turns.query: Compare spatial pollution patterns between Zhengding County and Xingtang County on 2025-06-20, analyzing inter-district pollution transport mechanisms.
